blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
